content.content:
Done — I scheduled the follow-up meeting but 10:00 was already booked.

Details:
- Title: Follow-up Meeting
- Date: 2024-05-19
- Time: 09:00–10:00 (1 hour)
- Description: Follow-up to discuss progress and next steps.
- Event ID: 27
- Participants: only you (emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com) were added by default

Why 09:00? The 10:00–11:00 slot is taken by "Project Kick-off" and 11:00–11:30 is a One‑on‑One, so the next available one‑hour slot that day was 09:00–10:00.

Next steps — what would you like me to do?
- Invite specific people (list emails)
- Change the time (suggest another preferred slot)
- Add a location or additional description
- Cancel or reschedule this event

Tell me which and I’ll update it.
